content.query:
select im.itno as item_number
,       itds as item_desc
, fuds as item_long_desc
, itcl as brand
, itgr as category
, cs.tx40 as category_desc
, prgp as item_type
, mabu as'make[1]_or_buy[2]'
, buar as business_area
, ilen as length
, iwid as width
, ihei as height
, grwe as gross_weight
, cfi4 as trump_tariff
, pupr as purchase_price
, suno as supplier
, sapr as sales_price
, mf.csno as hts_code
from m3.mitmas Im 
join m3.mitfac mf on im.itno = mf.itno
left join m3.csytab cs on im.itgr = cs.stky and cs.stco = 'ITGR'
